creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
I still have the problem (with 1.78_2 now) with the default options.

On the other hand, commenting out USE_CXXSTD=c++11 in the port Makefile builds a working executable.

FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE r317611 amd64
FreeBSD clang version 4.0.0 (tags/RELEASE_400/final 297347)
